pi_items.verified_value: Mirror the given image (from redraw_symmetrical activity) - NO activity named 'Reflections' or 'Mirror Image' exists in GCompris
pi_items.source: GitHub GCompris-qt repository: activities.txt (201 activities) and redraw_symmetrical/ActivityInfo.qml. Query of all activities shows only 'redraw_symmetrical' contains symmetry/mirror semantics. Verified by examining complete activities list at https://github.com/gcompris/GCompris-qt/blob/master/src/activities/activities.txt and checking ActivityInfo.qml files.
redraw_symmetrical activity has section: 'puzzle' only. No 'Math' or 'Geometry' categories are assigned to this activity in GCompris source code.

privileged_info_summary: The task attempts to use GCompris (real open-source educational software). The expected output path /home/ga/mirror_solved.png is correctly specified. However, the activity_name claim 'Reflections / Mirror Image' is contradicted by GCompris source code. GCompris contains only 201 activities total; a complete search of activities.txt and ActivityInfo.qml files reveals no activity named 'Reflections' or 'Mirror Image'. The closest match is 'redraw_symmetrical' with title 'Mirror the given image'. The category 'Puzzle' is verified (section: 'puzzle' in GCompris), but 'Math' and 'Geometry' are not assigned to this activity. The data is synthetic (screenshots generated during task execution from real GCompris software).
